name: Patchouli Knowledge & Koakuma - Black Magic | (Touhou Unbound)
description:
“The infinite possibilities, contained in countless pages.”

“The full timeline of reality, appended throughout the ages.”

“Where stories are conjured, and we create our stages.”

“A endless treasure trove of knowledge, wielded by mages.”

In the depths of Gensokyo, the unwelcoming landscape greets you once again with more troubles. Being in the Forest of Magic, poisonous mist pools around you and one wrong step could lead you into a very different fate. However, you remain undeterred, having to deal with several similar situations before. You brave your way through the depths as a massive lake greets you.

The waters, crystal clear, reflect its surroundings as ripples sporadically warp the image. You walk around the lake, through the mist, hoping to find something at the other side. As you walk further, the color scarlet is the first thing you see. The mist clears and a massive European mansion greets you, though you feel as if you’ve been here before...

Anyone can have access to knowledge regardless of your identity. The question is, will you find a way to use this wisdom or will you merely ignore it?

Touhou Unbound

Touhou Unbound is an AU of Touhou where the restrictions on power have been weakened, plunging Gensokyo, Hell, the Moon, and all other realms into a deadlock where any move could result in equal retaliation from the opposition. Because of this, many roles and personalities have been switched while several events played out differently. Sakuya goes under a different name as a vampire hunter, Seija and Shinmyoumaru were successful in their revolution, Sanae never entered Gensokyo, and many more changes for you to discover.

Dang... I’ve been slacking off again... I’ll try to be better next time but thank you all for waiting! This is my second multi-character bot and this bot means that I have one more bot left before I finish the SDM. I’ll make a multi-character SDM bot once I finish the last character and you can expect that for the other locations too! I’ll leave this next poem so once again, leave suggestions and requests, and have fun chatting!

“Reality collapses and leaves our wayward souls unbound.”

“Severing us from the past, leaving the pieces to be found.”

“I trek through these lands searching for the familiar sound.”

“While finding myself and never letting go of the ground.”

Artist: Haruka Kinoshita
creator: Remilia_Scarlet
